# Statement of Work (Template)

This Statement of Work ("SOW") is entered into between **Aegis Health AI Ltd** (Company No. 16695420, trading as "Aegis AI") and **[Client / Business Name]** ("Client"), and is governed by the Master Service Agreement between the parties (`docs/templates/MasterServiceAgreement.md`), which takes precedence on any general terms not restated here.

**SOW #:** [sequential]
**Date:**

## 1. Scope of work
[Itemized deliverables — copy directly from the accepted Proposal/Quotation, don't re-summarize loosely; ambiguity here is the single most common source of dispute later.]

## 2. Explicitly excluded
[Copy from the Proposal's "out of scope" section.]

## 3. Timeline
| Milestone | Date |
|---|---|
| Kickoff (on deposit clearing) | |
| [Milestone(s)] | |
| Client review | |
| Launch | |

## 4. Payment
**Total project fee:** £[amount]
**Schedule:** [50% deposit / 50% final, or 30/40/30 — state exact amounts, not just percentages]
Payment terms and the ownership/deployment trigger are as set out in [`PaymentSystem.md`](../PaymentSystem.md) — in short: **development starts only once the deposit clears, and deployment/code handover happens only once final payment clears.**

## 5. Ownership
Full ownership of the final delivered code, content, and assets transfers to the Client on receipt of final payment. Aegis retains no ongoing rights to the delivered work beyond what's needed to provide any agreed Managed Services retainer.

## 6. Change requests
Any work requested beyond Section 1's scope is handled via a Change Request (`docs/templates/ChangeRequestForm.md`) and quoted/agreed separately before being actioned.

## 7. Client responsibilities
The Client agrees to provide requested content, feedback, and approvals within a reasonable time (recommend stating a specific number of business days) — delays on the Client's side may shift the delivery timeline accordingly.
